name: Federal Employees Newark
description_short: City Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union serving members in Amarillo, Texas, offering checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services with routing number 311376737.
description_long: City Federal Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative based in Amarillo, Texas, with two branch locations (Lincoln Street and Soncy Road). The institution provides comprehensive financial services including deposit accounts, various loan products, and digital banking capabilities to its membership base. The credit union emphasizes accessibility through multiple service channels: in-person lobby and drive-thru banking, online banking, mobile app functionality, fee-free ATM access, and phone support. Their routing number 311376737 facilitates electronic transactions and account transfers. City Federal distinguishes itself through credit union membership structure, offering competitive deposit rates, personalized service at physical branches, and extended hours on select days including Saturday availability at the Soncy location. The institution serves a specific geographic market in the Texas Panhandle rather than operating nationally. As a credit union, City Federal likely requires membership eligibility, and their product offerings are standard for mid-sized regional credit unions without apparent specialty lending or premium investment services.
services: Online and mobile banking with check deposit
Wire transfers and ACH transfers between members
pros: Two convenient branch locations in Amarillo with extended lobby and drive-thru hours
Fee-free ATM locator service for members to access cash without surcharges
Mobile check deposit through smartphone app for remote account management
Multiple deposit products including Savings, Checking, Share Certificates, and IRA accounts
Diverse loan offerings: auto, specialty vehicle, personal, home equity, and skip-a-pay options
Online and mobile banking with secure messaging and customized account alerts
Saturday lobby hours available at Soncy Branch location (9am-12pm)
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Amarillo, Texas area with only two branches
No indication of online account opening or full digital-only membership option
Website does not display specific interest rates or APRs for deposits or loans, requiring direct contact
No mention of business banking products or services for commercial customers
Contact form explicitly prohibits secure transmission of account numbers, limiting digital support efficiency
best_for: Amarillo, Texas residents seeking local credit union membership with physical branch access
Members wanting competitive deposit rates and personalized loan approval processes
Consumers preferring member-owned financial institutions over large commercial banks
diagnosis: City Federal Credit Union is best for Amarillo-area residents seeking traditional credit union banking with in-person service, competitive rates, and a member-owned structure. Primary caveat: limited geographic availability and lack of full digital account opening means membership requires proximity to their two Texas locations.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
